modeling_status.reason: The SVG exposes labels A/B/C, outer gates 1-8, an F marker, and several colored route overlays, but it does not encode a unique start state, goal terminal, or proof-edge boundary. A faithful pda_stack graph would require choosing whether 'start: any outer gate' means multiple packages, multiple starts, or an artificial dispatcher.
modeling_status.next_step: Resolve three terminal questions before executable authoring: which outer gate is the canonical start for validation; whether the blue F square is the only goal or a named interior point; and which colored overlays are physical edges versus Cantor proof support steps.
